prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find C++ and Go source files implementing rate limiting in envoyproxy/envoy and kubernetes/kubernetes. For Envoy: the local rate limit filter and the global rate limit service client. For K8s: the API server rate limiting (token bucket) and the flowcontrol APF priority level handling.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find C++ and Go source files implementing rate limiting in envoyproxy/envoy and kubernetes/kubernetes. For Envoy: the local rate limit filter and the global rate limit service client. For K8s: the API server rate limiting (token bucket) and the flowcontrol APF priority level handling.
